accessibility.rotateLandscape: Rotate to landscape for the full table layout.

phases.SYSTEM_COPY: The system presses first. Resolve escalation before the table can answer.
phases.COALITION_COPY: Lay out two prepared moves for each seat, then mark the whole coalition ready.
phases.RESOLUTION_COPY: Prepared moves resolve in order. Check the board, then reckon with victory or loss.

home.roomOfflineOnly: This build is configured for offline play only.
home.roomUnavailable: Room service unavailable. Local table still works.
home.replacesBody: The product now ships one canonical six-region map, Bodies and Evidence, Global Gaze, War Machine, Extraction Tokens, Secret Mandates, and Liberation or Symbolic victory.
home.pasteSave: Paste a serialized save payload here.

app.roomCredentialMissingBody: No seat credential was found for this room on this browser. Start from the home screen or recreate the room.
app.roomRestoreFailed: The room could not be restored. The app returned to the home screen.
app.roomSyncLostBody: The room service stopped responding. The table was kept alive offline.
app.roomFallbackLocal: Could not reach the room service. The game started offline instead.
app.commandFailedBody: The room rejected the command. The table stayed unchanged.
app.saveRestoredBody: Serialized state loaded into a local table.
app.saveInvalidBody: Save payload could not be parsed.
app.autosaveMissingBody: No autosave was found for this browser.
app.saveCopiedBody: Serialized save copied to the clipboard.
app.clipboardUnavailableBody: Copy the serialized save from the app state if needed.
app.rebuildingStateBody: The app is resolving the room permalink and seat credential.

guide.playerGuideDetail: Use this as the fast onboard for the cutover ruleset.
guide.coreThreat1: Extraction Tokens are the center of the board. The system adds them through system cards and intervention.
guide.coreThreat2: Any region reaching 6 Extraction Tokens is an immediate loss.
guide.coreThreat3: Global Gaze and War Machine shape how dangerous each round becomes.
guide.loop1: System Phase: resolve system cards, backlash, and interventions.
guide.loop2: Coalition Phase: queue two moves for each seat, then mark every seat ready.
guide.loop3: Resolution Phase: resolve the prepared moves in priority order, then check victory and defeat.
guide.economy1: Bodies live in regions and are spent from those regions.
guide.economy2: Evidence belongs to seats and powers campaigns, appeals, and support work.
guide.economy3: Defense is temporary and only exists to blunt the next system strike.
guide.beacon1: Symbolic mode activates three Beacons from a six-card deck.
guide.beacon2: Every faction carries a Secret Mandate. Reaching the public win condition without satisfying all Secret Mandates still ends in failure.

mode.liberationSummary: End Resolution with every region at 1 Extraction or less.
mode.liberationProgress: {{count}} regions already sit at the threshold.
mode.liberationStatus: Keep every theatre below the breach line while preserving all Secret Mandates.

game.extractionPoolTooltip: Shared system pressure still in the extraction pool.
game.regionExtractionTooltip: Extraction Tokens: {{count}}. If this reaches 6, the region is lost. Remove them with Launch Campaign, Build Solidarity, and resistance effects.
game.regionDefenseTooltip: Defense: {{count}}. Defense absorbs the next system strike here, then clears. Raise it with Defend and supportive effects before the system phase.
game.regionBodiesTooltip: Bodies: {{count}}. Bodies are the people and organizing strength in this region. Commit them to Launch Campaign, Build Solidarity, and Defend.
game.nearBreachRisk: This region is already near the breach line.
game.campaignRisk: Campaigns can consume resources without clearing the front.
game.beaconPressureSummary: {{count}} beacon objectives still need to be completed.
game.regionsAboveThreshold: {{count}} regions remain above the liberation threshold.
game.comradesReinforce: Reinforce a region with fresh Bodies.
game.comradesGather: Gather Evidence and draw new resistance cards.
game.comradesCampaign: Press a vulnerable front with coordinated force.
game.comradesSmuggle: Move Evidence across seats through a corridor.
game.comradesShield: Set a shield against the next strike.
game.comradesUnleash: Unleash a prepared card effect now.
game.trackGazeHigh: Global Gaze is breaking through the blockade.
game.trackGazeLow: Global Gaze is fragile and easily reversed.
game.trackWarHigh: War Machine is near a breach posture.
game.trackWarLow: War Machine pressure is contained for now.
game.systemPhaseHint: Press play to resolve the system strike and open coalition planning.
game.coalitionPhaseHint: Prepare moves, then mark every seat ready.
game.coalitionMovesRemainingHint: Prepare both moves for this seat before marking it ready.
game.coalitionWaitingHint: Every seat must be marked ready before the coalition can resolve.
game.coalitionResolveHint: The coalition is ready. Resolve the prepared moves.
game.resolutionPhaseHint: Check the aftermath, then begin the next round.
game.noMajorChangeYetBody: Resolve the current phase to see the next material shifts on tracks, regions, and coalition resources.
game.phaseInsightSystemCards: System cards and intervention push Extraction Tokens, War Machine pressure, and direct harm onto exposed regions.
game.phaseInsightSystemRefresh: Defense clears, each seat regains two moves, and resolving this strike opens coalition planning.
game.phaseInsightCoalitionPlan: Each seat prepares two moves. Costs and targets are locked now so the coalition can resolve in a shared order.
game.phaseInsightCoalitionReadyPending: This seat still has moves to prepare before it can mark ready.
game.phaseInsightCoalitionReady: When every seat is ready, the prepared moves resolve and the board changes.
game.phaseInsightResolutionResolve: Prepared moves now change Domains, regions, Bodies, Evidence, and cards in priority order.
game.phaseInsightResolutionCheck: After resolution, the game checks victory, defeat, Secret Mandates, and whether a new round begins.
game.drawReviewHint: Review the latest reveal here, then inspect the discard pile for earlier cards.
game.systemReviewHint: Review the latest escalation here, then inspect the active tray for structural pressure already in play.
game.noRevealYet: No card has been revealed for this deck yet.
game.revealToDiscard: Revealed on the board, then moved to discard.
game.revealToActive: Revealed on the board, then placed in the escalation tray.
game.drawsVisible: Draws reveal on the board before they settle into discard.
game.drawsWaiting: Draws will reveal here when the decks move.

map.viewportDetail: SVG board restored as a live state layer
map.viewportNote: Markers reflect Extraction Tokens, Defense, and Bodies on the current six-region ruleset.
map.legendDetail: Read the board at a glance
map.worldMapAlt: World map showing the six canonical theatres

debug.title: Debug
debug.autoplayIdle: Ready to run scripted rounds through the normal game flow.
debug.autoplayInvalid: Enter a valid round count before starting autoplay.
debug.autoplayLocalOnly: Autoplay is only available on local tables.
debug.autoplayFinished: Autoplay finished at the requested round mark.
debug.autoplayWon: Autoplay stopped because the coalition won.
debug.autoplayLost: Autoplay stopped because the coalition lost.
debug.autoplayNoCommand: Autoplay found no legal command and stopped.
debug.autoplayCommandError: Autoplay stopped after a command error.

history.rollMeaningNone: No board change followed from the roll.
history.eventMandateFailure: Public victory failed because Secret Mandates were broken.
history.eventPublicAttention: System pressure shifted under public attention.

base_design.name: Where the Stones Cry Out
base_design.description: A six-region cooperative struggle against extraction, war, hunger, and erasure.
base_design.introduction: The coalition is trying to do more than survive. It must break extraction, move Evidence across borders, and keep every movement's Secret Mandate intact long enough to win together.

WarMachine.name: War Machine
WarMachine.description: Militarism, bases, and logistics of permanent intervention.

DyingPlanet.name: Dying Planet
DyingPlanet.description: Ecological defense against flood, fire, extraction, and collapse.

GildedCage.name: Gilded Cage
GildedCage.description: Freedom from carceral control, dispossession, and managed rights.

SilencedTruth.name: Silenced Truth
SilencedTruth.description: Evidence, press freedom, and the ability to circulate testimony.

EmptyStomach.name: Empty Stomach
EmptyStomach.description: Food sovereignty, debt resistance, and survival beyond austerity.

FossilGrip.name: Fossil Grip
FossilGrip.description: Energy justice against pipeline rule, sacrifice zones, and fuel empires.

StolenVoice.name: Stolen Voice
StolenVoice.description: Cultural survival, language, art, and memory against erasure.

Congo.name: Congo Basin
Congo.description: Mining corridors, rainforest sovereignty, and cobalt imperialism.

Levant.name: The Levant
Levant.description: Occupation, siege, surveillance, and the politics of imposed scarcity.

Amazon.name: The Amazon
Amazon.description: Forest defense against land theft, agribusiness, and settler violence.
Amazon.strapline: The forest is treated as inventory.

Sahel.name: The Sahel
Sahel.description: Climate breakdown, hunger, border regimes, and securitized aid.
Sahel.strapline: Security doctrine feeds the famine line.

Mekong.name: The Mekong
Mekong.description: Water memory against dams, agribusiness, and fossil corridors.
Mekong.strapline: The river is partitioned for profit.

Andes.name: The Andes
Andes.description: Highland resistance to debt, lithium extraction, and privatized life.
Andes.strapline: The mountain is priced before it is heard.

congo_basin_collective.name: Congo Basin Collective
congo_basin_collective.passive: Organize gains +1 Body in Congo and Launch Campaign gains +1 there.
congo_basin_collective.mandateDescription: End with Congo at 2 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Dying Planet ahead of War Machine.

levant_sumud.name: Levant Sumud Front
levant_sumud.passive: Defend gains +1 Defense in the Levant and campaigns against War Machine gain +1 there.
levant_sumud.weakness: Organize outside the Levant gains -1 Body.
levant_sumud.mandateDescription: End with the Levant at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and War Machine at 6 or less.

mekong_echo_network.name: Mekong Echo Network
mekong_echo_network.passive: Investigate gains +1 Evidence in the Mekong and support cards gain +1 on Silenced Truth campaigns.
mekong_echo_network.weakness: Defend outside the Mekong sets 1 less Defense.
mekong_echo_network.mandateDescription: End with the Mekong at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Silenced Truth at 5 or more.

amazon_guardians.name: Amazon Guardians
amazon_guardians.passive: Campaigns in the Amazon or Dying Planet gain +1 and Organize gains +1 Body in the Amazon.
amazon_guardians.weakness: Smuggle Evidence can move only 1 Evidence at a time.
amazon_guardians.mandateDescription: End with the Amazon at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Fossil Grip at 5 or more progress.

organize.name: Organize
organize.description: Roll 1d6 Bodies into a region, plus pressure bonuses where extraction is already entrenched.

investigate.name: Investigate
investigate.description: Generate Evidence and draw resistance cards.

launch_campaign.name: Launch Campaign
launch_campaign.description: Commit Bodies and Evidence to a 2d6 campaign against a Domain in a region.

build_solidarity.name: Build Solidarity
build_solidarity.description: Spend 3 Bodies in-region to advance a Domain without a roll.

smuggle_evidence.name: Smuggle Evidence
smuggle_evidence.description: Move Evidence to another faction through a risky corridor.

international_outreach.name: Global Appeal
international_outreach.description: Spend Evidence to raise Global Gaze.

defend.name: Defend
defend.description: Convert Bodies into a one-round Defense Rating against the next intervention.

play_card.name: Play Card
play_card.description: Resolve an action card from hand for direct tactical impact.

beacon_levant_corridor.title: Corridor Of Return
beacon_levant_corridor.description: Levant at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Global Gaze at 10 or more.

beacon_mekong_testimony.title: River Testimony
beacon_mekong_testimony.description: Mekong at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Silenced Truth at 5 or more.

beacon_amazon_sovereignty.title: Forest Sovereignty
beacon_amazon_sovereignty.description: Amazon at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Dying Planet at 6 or more.

beacon_congo_commons.title: Copper Commons
beacon_congo_commons.description: Congo at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Fossil Grip at 5 or more.

beacon_sahel_bread_pact.title: Bread Pact
beacon_sahel_bread_pact.description: Sahel at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Empty Stomach at 5 or more.

beacon_andes_charter.title: Mountain Charter
beacon_andes_charter.description: Andes at 1 or fewer Extraction Tokens and Gilded Cage at 5 or more.

res_archive_leak.name: Archive Leak
res_archive_leak.text: Raise Global Gaze by 1 and gain 1 Evidence.

res_mutual_aid_convoy.name: Mutual Aid Convoy
res_mutual_aid_convoy.text: Remove 1 Extraction Token from the target region.

res_radio_uprising.name: Radio Uprising
res_radio_uprising.text: Advance Silenced Truth by 1 and add 1 Body to the target region.

res_strike_fund.name: Strike Fund
res_strike_fund.text: Add 3 Bodies to the target region.

res_lawyers_brief.name: Lawyers Brief
res_lawyers_brief.text: Advance Gilded Cage by 1 and reduce War Machine by 1.

crisis_military_raid.name: Military Raid
crisis_military_raid.text: A logistics corridor is secured through direct force.

crisis_media_smear.name: Media Smear
crisis_media_smear.text: The movement is reframed as disorder to cool public attention.

crisis_fuel_convoy.name: Fuel Convoy
crisis_fuel_convoy.text: The corridor reopens under armed protection.

crisis_border_lockdown.name: Border Lockdown
crisis_border_lockdown.text: Containment expands under the language of security.

crisis_hunger_discipline.name: Hunger Discipline
crisis_hunger_discipline.text: Debt, rationing, and coercion force communities back into dependence.

crisis_climate_shock.name: Climate Shock
crisis_climate_shock.text: Disaster is turned into a fast lane for seizure.

crisis_memory_purge.name: Memory Purge
crisis_memory_purge.text: Archives, schools, and ceremonies are treated as hostile terrain.

crisis_attention_backlash.name: Attention Backlash
crisis_attention_backlash.text: Visibility triggers a sharper retaliatory strike.

crisis_port_seizure.name: Port Seizure
crisis_port_seizure.text: Trade chokepoints are tightened to discipline the region.

crisis_platform_blackout.name: Platform Blackout
crisis_platform_blackout.text: The channel collapses under coordinated censorship.

sys_emergency_powers.name: Emergency Powers Enacted
sys_emergency_powers.text: Exception is written into ordinary rule. Campaigns face a higher bar from here forward.

sys_resource_privatization_wave.name: Resource Privatization Wave
sys_resource_privatization_wave.text: Every new crisis becomes another pretext to deepen the carve-up.

sys_militarized_infrastructure.name: Militarized Infrastructure
sys_militarized_infrastructure.text: Roads, ports, and corridors become permanent security architecture.

sys_surveillance_normalization.name: Surveillance Normalization
sys_surveillance_normalization.text: Every campaign now moves through denser fog and better targeting.

sys_structural_adjustment_program.name: Structural Adjustment Program
sys_structural_adjustment_program.text: Appeals to the outside now cost more because every concession is monetized.

sys_counterinsurgency_doctrine.name: Counterinsurgency Doctrine Expansion
sys_counterinsurgency_doctrine.text: Evidence circulates more slowly as suppression becomes doctrine.
